title: Lovoo Agents
subtitle: Manage reusable AI agents and link them to system features.

agents.title: Registered agents
agents.empty: No agents registered. Create the first agent.
agents.confirmDelete: Delete agent "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

fields.name: Name
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the purpose of this agent
fields.isActiveHint: Inactive agents do not run, even if linked to a use.
fields.modelHint: Select the model this agent will use.
fields.promptHint: Defines the agent's behavior and personality.
fields.knowledgeBasePlaceholder: Insert texts, documents or rules the agent should know...
fields.knowledgeBaseHint: Free text made available to the agent as additional context.
fields.knowledgeModeHint: Defines how the agent accesses knowledge during execution.
fields.topKHint: Maximum number of retrieved passages. Default: 5.
fields.minSimilarityHint: Relevance filter between 0 and 1. Use 0 for no filter.

documents.title: RAG Documents
documents.empty: No documents uploaded for this agent.
documents.uploadHint: Formats: .txt and .md. Max: 1 MB per file.
documents.confirmDelete: Delete document "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
documents.saveFirst: Save the agent before uploading documents.
documents.staleWarning: Processing started more than 15 min ago — may be stuck.

bindings.title: Functional links
bindings.subtitle: Select which agent will be activated for each system feature.
bindings.noAgentHint: No agent selected — the system will use the default fallback.
bindings.confirmReplace: This use already has a linked agent ("{{current}}"). Replace it with "{{next}}"?
